hero.eyebrow: Ten islands · One people · One soul
hero.subtitle: Ten islands at the heart of the Atlantic. A people shaped by music, history, sea and morabeza.

islands.title: Ten Islands of the
islands.subtitle: From Barlavento to Sotavento, each island is a world. Choose yours and start discovering.

islandsPage.subtitle: From Barlavento to Sotavento, each island is a world. Choose yours and start discovering.

diaspora.title: A People
diaspora.subtitle: Over 700,000 Cape Verdeans live outside the archipelago. The diaspora is part of the country's soul.

footer.tagline: Ten islands. One people. One soul.
footer.description: Digital portal dedicated to the culture, identity and tourism of Cape Verde.

meta.homeTitle: Nós Cabo Verde — Ten islands. One people. One soul.
meta.homeDesc: Digital portal of Cape Verdean culture, beauty and identity. Discover the ten islands, music, cuisine, people and authentic experiences of Cape Verde.
meta.islandsTitle: The Ten Islands of Cape Verde: complete guide to Barlavento and Sotavento
meta.islandsDesc: Explore the ten islands of Cape Verde: Santo Antão, São Vicente, São Nicolau, Sal, Boa Vista, Maio, Santiago, Fogo and Brava. Each island has its own personality, music and unique culture.
meta.experiencesTitle: Experiences in Cape Verde: trekking, kitesurfing, diving and culture
meta.experiencesDesc: Book authentic experiences in Cape Verde: trekking in Paul Valley, kitesurfing in Sal, diving in Santa Luzia, climbing Pico do Fogo and much more.
meta.diasporaTitle: Cape Verdean Diaspora: stories, communities and roots
meta.diasporaDesc: Discover the Cape Verdean diaspora: 700,000 Cape Verdeans spread across the world. Stories from Portugal, USA, France, the Netherlands and more.

islandsSection.heading: The Ten Islands
islandsSection.subtitle: Each island has its own personality, its own music and its own way of making you feel at home.
islandsSection.emptyHint: Hover to preview, click an island to pin it, then explore in detail.

musicSection.mornaDesc: The soul of Cape Verde. Music of longing, love and the sea — recognized as UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage.
musicSection.funanadesc: Infectious rhythm from the islands of Santiago and Maio. Accordion and iron bar in a frantic, dance-inducing dialogue.
musicSection.batuqueDesc: Ancestral expression of the women of Santiago. Percussion, song and dance linked to spirituality.
musicSection.colaDesc: More joyful and fast-paced than morna, coladeira speaks of love and everyday life with irony and lightness.
musicSection.tabankaDesc: Musical tradition of Santiago linked to popular festivities — processions, choral singing and drums.

flavorsSection.desc: From cachupa to Fogo cheese. From grilled lobster to Santo Antão grogue. A cuisine that tells the story of a people.

agendaSection.alertsDesc: Subscribe to alerts by island, category and date.

editorialSection.heading: In the Spotlight
editorialSection.communityDesc: Every family carries a piece of Cape Verde. Share yours.

diasporaSection.body: There are more Cape Verdeans outside the islands than inside them. Spread across more than 120 countries, they carry the Creole language, morna and morabeza — the art of being generous — wherever they go.
diasporaSection.stat2: more in the diaspora than on the islands

footerFull.newsletterDesc: Stories, events, recipes and much more. Straight to your inbox.
footerFull.description: Digital portal of Cape Verdean culture, identity and beauty.
footerFull.bottomTagline: We don’t just show Cape Verde. We make the world feel it.

diasporaPage.stat1: More outside than inside the islands

diasporaPage.ctaBody: If you represent a Cape Verdean association or community worldwide, contact us to be featured on this platform and connect with the global network.

partnersPage.ctaBody: Share your passion for Cape Verde with travellers from around the world. Become a verified partner of the platform.

facesSection.heading: Faces of
facesSection.desc: The stories that make Cape Verde more than a destination. Real people, with real stories.
facesSection.cta: Meet more people from Cape Verde

mundialSection.desc: Ten islands. One people. A dream that crossed the Atlantic. The Blue Sharks wrote history and carried the blue star flag to the biggest stage in world football.
